Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 6 (Discussion of School Assignments and Committee Assignments for Board Members for the 2024-25 School Year) was pulled due to trustee Cecilia being absent.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve second all those in favor
